title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Forever 21 India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Forever 21 India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
